results.title: Syed Riyaz
highlights:
Senior AI QA Engineer / SDET | GenAI/LLM + Backend & API Automation @ Gen Digital (Norton • Avast • LifeLock) | Python • Playwright • AWS Bedrock • Cursor • Copilot | 6+ Yrs
...
I'm a Senior AI QA Engineer / SDET with 6+ years in Quality Engineering across UI, API, and now GenAI testing — helping teams ship products that stay accurate, safe, and trustworthy. Today I'm the sole QA owner of GenAI backend at Gen Digital (formerly NortonLifeLock) — the cybersecurity company behind Norton, Avast, LifeLock, Avira, and AVG. I own the test strategy for a multi-provider AI cybersecurity assistant end-to-end: response accuracy, provider routing, knowledge-base validation, entitlement-aware flows like Dark Web Monitoring and Privacy Monitor, streaming behaviour, and V1/V2 architecture parity. My stack is Python (pytest) talking to AWS Bedrock, Lambda, and Step Functions, wired into TeamCity pipelines I author in Kotlin DSL. Before this I shipped Playwright (JavaScript) UI automation for ML application detection, and earlier owned Selenium + Cucumber BDD frameworks for insurance portals at Cognizant — where I held a 0% production defect-leakage record across 12+ releases. What I bring to a team: • GenAI / LLM testing — comfortable designing strategies for non-deterministic outputs, streaming flows, and provider routing. • Full-stack automation — Python, Playwright, Selenium/Java. The right tool for the product, not the other way around. • AI-augmented QA workflow — Cursor (GPT-5, Claude Opus, Composer) and GitHub Copilot for AI-assisted test generation, framework refactoring, Kotlin DSL pipeline authoring, and faster RCA. I ship more, faster, with quality intact. • Cloud-aware QA — AWS Bedrock, Lambda, Step Functions, API Gateway, DynamoDB, Athena, CloudWatch. I believe quality engineering in the AI era isn't just "does it work?" — it's "does it stay safe and trustworthy at scale?" Open to connecting with QA leaders, AI product teams, and recruiters hiring for Senior SDET or AI Quality roles. Drop a message — happy to chat.

results.title: Akashdeep N.
highlights:
Engineering leader with 13 years of engineering experience — 12+ at Gen Digital, with the last 3 running the team that owns the consumer-facing storefront platform serving Norton, Avast, AVG, and Avira customers across 150+ countries (supporting nearly 500M users and Gen Digital's $4B+ consumer business). I lead a fully distributed 15-engineer organization across 3 scrum teams, owning 8+ services and partnering with product, operations, QA, partner-integration, and tenant engineering teams to ship change across the platform. Recent hands-on time has gone into a production AI footprint on AWS Bedrock: • Code review agent — Jira MCP + Claude on AWS Bedrock; in active daily use across the team • TDD enablement agent (Confluence MCP) — generates test cases across happy/edge/negative paths • Codebase-aware RAG layer in build over internal Java/React repos • PR Insights — internal AI media-coverage agent for marketing/PR teams (multi-market, multi-brand): contributed MCP + Spring AI + MongoDB design • AI-assisted UX embedded in internal business workflows Multi-year programs I've led or co-led across the platform: • Multi-tenant brand onboarding (Avast, AVG, Avira) — product/SKU setup, pricing, promo codes, AEM content, tenant-aware isolation • Monolith-to-microservices and on-prem-to-cloud modernization • Payments stack modernization — Adyen, CleverBridge, NetProphets, 3-D Secure, regional payment methods, digital wallets • ML-based churn scoring + dynamic-pricing framework with data science Team velocity: 3 scrum teams sustain 50-60 story points per sprint each (~150+ SP per sprint org throughput) with minimal spillover. Cycles 40-60% faster post AI rollout. Zero-rollback release record across dozens of production releases. Gen AI Engineer

About the Product ALBIS™ Enterprise-grade no code AI Automation studio designed to enable anyone to create and manage experiences across physical, digital, and virtual spaces. ALBIS takes experience management to a whole new standard by leveraging Gen AI, Robotic Automation, IoT, AR/VR, and other advanced tech to enable actions like real-time data checks, outcome prediction, task automation, and autopilot activation. highlights:

# Senior GEN AI Data Scientist
...
Fractal Analytics is a strategic AI partner to Fortune 500 companies with a vision to power every human decision in the enterprise. Fractal is building a world where individual choices, freedom, and diversity are the greatest assets. An ecosystem where human imagination is at the heart of every decision. Where no possibility is written off, only challenged to get better. We believe that a true Fractalite empowers imagination with intelligence. And that it will be such Fractalites that will continue to build the company for the next 100 years.
...
Senior GenAI Data Scientist
...
The role involves designing, developing, and deploying advanced Machine Learning and Generative AI solutions to derive insights from large-scale, fragmented, and unstructured data. The position focuses on building robust Python-based data pipelines, applying state-of-the-art techniques such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Large Language Model (LLM) fine-tuning, and embedding optimization, and ensuring scalable deployment on Azure using MLOps best practices. The role requires close collaboration with engineering teams to productionize, monitor, and continuously improve models through experimentation, A/B testing, and metrics-driven iterations, ultimately delivering reliable and high-impact AI solutions.
...
- Research, design, and implement ML and GenAI solutions for fragmented, large-scale, and unstructured datasets.
- Develop data pipelines and workflows in Python for ingestion, transformation, and feature engineering.
- Apply advanced techniques like RAG, LLM fine-tuning, and embedding optimization for improved performance.
- Work with large databases, data warehouses, and integrate across multiple sources with ambiguity handling.
- Deploy models using Azure, ensuring scalability and governance with MLOps best practices.
- Conduct experimentation and A/B testing to validate hypotheses and optimize outcomes.
- Collaborate with engineering teams for productionization and monitoring of models.
- Drive continuous improvement through metrics-driven insights and iterative refinements.

About the position

The PositionWhy GenentechWe're passionate about delivering on Our Promise to improve the lives of patients and create healthier communities for all. We foster a culture of inclusivity, integrity and creativity while boldly pursuing answers to the world's most complex health challenges and transforming society.Genentech's Data, Digital, and Analytics (DDA) team is dedicated to solving complex healthcare challenges and improving patient outcomes. DDA empowers business partners across Commercial, Medical, and Government Affairs (CMG) to make impactful decisions by leveraging data, analytics, and AI/ML to enable fast, targeted actions in rapidly evolving business contexts.DDA fosters a unified understanding of customers, actions, and outcomes by transforming the business insight supply chain from the traditional reactive service model to a modern proactive product model, which integrates analytics and insights seamlessly into CMG's evolving digital, data, and automation platforms, creating scalable solutions and eliminating silos. In DDA, you will work as a trusted, objective advisor and expert, recommending critical decisions and actions to be taken with credibility and a focus on driving measurable impact. You will be part of a diverse, inclusive team that reflects the world we serve, thriving in a welcoming culture built on collaboration and innovation.The OpportunityThe Sr. Data Scientist - Generative AI Application Specialist is responsible for building fundamental agentic capabilities and high-level business applications within a fast-moving, experimental environment. This role bridges the gap between technical infrastructure and user experience, collaborating with infrastructure teams to design agents and partnering with product owners to ensure optimal development approaches for desired UX. As a subject matter expert, you will stay at the forefront of Generative AI models and capabilities, influencing technical priorities in a complex enterprise environment while representing the team across the global Roche organization.

Machine Learning Engineer, Genai Technology A Career with Point72's Technology Team As Point72 reimagines the future of investing, our Technology team is constantly evolving our firm’s IT infrastructure and engineering capabilities, positioning us at the forefront of a rapidly evolving technology landscape. We’re a team of experts who experiment and work to discover new ways to harness open-source solutions, modern cloud architectures, and sophisticated Artificial Intelligence (AI) solutions, while embracing enterprise agile methodologies. Our commitment to building and innovating in the AI space provides the framework intended to drive smarter decision making and enhance how we build and operate our platforms and applications. As a member of Point72’s Technology team, we encourage and support your professional development from day one—helping you advance your technical skills, contribute innovative ideas, and satisfy your own intellectual curiosity—all while delivering real business impact for our multi-billion-dollar global business.   What you’ll do Develop and maintain scalable AI/ML architectures and systems.  Collaborate with data scientists, engineers, product teams, and compliance to integrate AI/ML solutions into existing and new products. Evaluate tools, technologies, and processes to ensure the highest quality and performance of AI/ML systems.  Stay abreast of the latest advancements in AI/ML technologies and methodologies.  Ensure compliance with industry standards and best practices in AI/ML.   What’s required Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.  3-7 years of experience in AI/ML engineering, with a proven track record of successful project delivery.  Strong expertise in machine learning frameworks and libraries (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit- learn). Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, or C++.  Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently and collaboratively.  Strong communication skills, with the ability to convey complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders. Commitment to highest ethical standards.   We take care of our people We invest in our people, their careers, their health, and their well-being. When you work here, we provide: Fully-paid health care benefits Generous parental and family leave policies Mental and physical wellness programs Volunteer opportunities Non-profit matching gift program Support for employee-led affinity groups representing women, minorities and the LGBTQ+ community Tuition assistance A 401(k) savings program with an employer match and more   About Point72 Point72 is a leading global alternative investment firm led by Steven A. Cohen. Building on more than 30 years of investing experience, Point72 seeks to deliver superior returns for its investors through fundamental and systematic investing strategies across asset classes and geographies. We aim to attract and retain the industry’s brightest talent by cultivating an investor-led culture and committing to our people’s long-term growth. For more information, visit www.Point72.com/about. The annual base salary range for this role is $185,000-$300,000 (USD) , which does not include discretionary bonus compensation or our comprehensive benefits package. Actual compensation offered to the successful candidate may vary from posted hiring range based upon geographic location, work experience, education, and/or skill level, among other things.

# Machine Learning Data Scientist

Gen is a global company dedicated to powering Digital Freedom through its trusted consumer brands. They are seeking a Machine Learning Data Scientist to contribute to the company’s AI transformation by applying machine learning and AI to real-world, revenue-impacting problems. Responsibilities Work end-to-end on machine learning and AI projects, from problem definition and data exploration to modeling, deployment, and impact measurement Conduct experiments (A/B testing, offline evaluation) to validate model performance and business impact Collaborate cross-functionally with product, engineering, and business teams to translate business problems into technical solutions Continuously improve models through iteration, monitoring, and feedback loops Contribute to building data pipelines, feature engineering frameworks, and model infrastructure Communicate insights, results, and recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders Skills Bachelor's degree required Strong foundation in machine learning, statistics, and algorithms Proficiency in Python and common ML/data libraries Solid understanding of data processing, feature engineering, and model evaluation Strong curiosity and willingness to learn in a fast-evolving AI landscape Ownership mindset with the ability to drive projects end-to-end Passion for applying AI to real-world problems and delivering measurable impact Effective communication skills and ability to work in cross-functional teams Master's or Ph.D. preferred Experience building, deploying, or maintaining machine learning models or data-driven systems is a strong plus Experience with experimentation (A/B testing) and measuring impact is preferred Experience in areas such as deep learning, LLMs, and AI agents is a plus For new graduates, strong project experience or internship experience is highly valued Benefits 401(k) match Health insurance options Disability coverage Life insurance Unlimited paid time off Company Overview Gen is a cybersecurity company that offers security, identity protection, and privacy solutions. It was founded in 2022, and is headquartered in Tempe, Arizona, USA, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is https://www.gendigital.com.
